name: Curried Garlic Dip
recipeInstructions:
1. Add the plain yogurt to a mixing bowl.
2. Slowly incorporate the sour cream, stirring continuously until well combined and smooth.
3. Gradually add the dry mustard, stirring constantly.
4. Mix in the curry powder and garlic powder until all ingredients are thoroughly blended.
5. Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and chill in the refrigerator for at least 2 hours before serving.
6. Makes about 2 cups of dip.
7. Suggested dippers: Zucchini, Mushrooms, Cherry Tomatoes, Deli Meats, Chicken Drumettes
